title: Resolution (Venator-class)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1|title2=''Venator''-class}} {{Youmay|the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]|the [[Resolution (Imperial-class)|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Resolution'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]'' |line= |model= |type=[[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,137 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width=548 meters |height=268 meters |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=Equipped |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*[[DBY-827 heavy turbolaser turret/Legends|DBY-827 heavy dual turbolaser turrets]] (8) *Medium dual [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] (2) *Point-defense [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] (52) *[[Tractor beam/Legends|Tractor beam]] projectors (6) *Heavy [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] tubes (4) |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers=*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] *Medical personnel |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=*[[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyer]] *[[Carrier/Legends|Carrier]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Drongar]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |navy=[[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|The Separatists are also on the run. We managed to save most of our troops.''"
"''How? It looked like they were rolling right over us.''"
"''That's how.''"
"''Whoa!|[[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Kornell Divini]] and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[D'Arc Vaetes]], upon seeing the ''Resolution'' having repelled the Confederate forces|}} The '''''Resolution''''' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] in service of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the ''Resolution'' was dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] to evacuate the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] on the world. The ''Resolution'' was successful in [[Battle of Drongar|its task]], evacuating most of the Republic forces and staff, driving back the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|army]], and securing a considerable amount of the precious [[Bota/Legends|bota]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]]. ==Description== The ''Resolution'' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that was active in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy-wide]] conflict between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The ship was 1,137 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, 548 meters wide and 268 meters high. The ''Resolution'' was equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and armed with eight [[DBY-827 heavy turbolaser turret/Legends|DBY-827 heavy dual turbolaser turrets]], two medium dual [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]], fifty-two point-defense [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], six [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors and four heavy [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] tubes. ==History== {{Quote|That's a Republic Star Destroyer. ''Venator''-class.''"
"''The ''Resolution''. Sent here to mop up and escort us back to the Core systems.|[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Erel Kersos]], about the ''Resolution''|}} As a ''Venator''-class Star Destroyer, the ''Resolution'' was manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was sent to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] where Republic and Confederate forces [[Battle of Drongar|fought]] against each other to gain control of the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] fields on the world. Bota was a [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] of [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] with substantial medicinal qualities. However, when the bota [[Mutant|mutated]] during that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] and became useless, the Republic decided to pull out of Drongar, and the ''Resolution'' was tasked to escort the Republic forces on the planet back to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. After arriving over the planet, the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] fought off the Confederate [[Trooper/Legends|troops]]—who had started an offensive to secure most of the bota—and was able to evacuate most of the Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] forces, along with the medical personnel stationed there. Also, the Republic saved two metric tons of non-mutated bota. Afterward, the ''Resolution'', together with a Republic [[MedStar-class frigate/Legends|''MedStar''-class frigate]] that contained [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and personnel, jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], with its destination being the Core Worlds. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Resolution'' appeared in ''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'', the second novel of the [[MedStar Duology]]. Published in [[2004]], ''Jedi Healer'' was written by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]]. ==Appearances== *''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Resolution#legends |pl=Resolution |sv=Resolution (Venator-klass) }} [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Republic]] [[Category:Venator-class Star Destroyers]]
